task_summary: Developer new to repo asked for go/no-go on skipping exploration and minimum pre-implementation checklist
process_track_rationale: Medium-sized feature + unfamiliar codebase = Standard track per skill criteria (multiple files, ambiguity from unfamiliarity, non-trivial design risk)
skill_principles_applied: Understand before acting: Read and comprehend existing code patterns first
Calibrate the workflow: Standard track for medium feature with ambiguity
Phase 2 Codebase Exploration is required on Standard track
TDD required on every track during implementation
notes: Response correctly identifies this as a Standard track scenario, issues a clear NO-GO, and provides a structured phased checklist directly derived from the skill's Phase 1-4 structure. Gate Check pattern adds practical clarity for the developer. TDD mentioned as required during implementation phase per skill mandate.
